description: Provide a single private helper that imports the vendored FxConsole module, sets the configured theme (`ui.theme`, default `amber`), and is safe to call repeatedly. Other UI helpers call this lazily so non-UI code paths never load FxConsole.
notes: Tests must stub FxConsole, not load the real module — keep them fast.
steps: TDD: First call imports the vendored module and sets theme.
TDD: Honours `ui.useFxConsole = false` by silently degrading to `Write-Host` fallback.
TDD: Theme name comes from effective config.
Author `Private/UI/Import-FxConsole.ps1` using `Import-Module` against the vendored path.
Author `Private/UI/Use-FxConsole.ps1` returning a boolean indicating whether FxConsole is active.
Tests use `TestDrive:` with a stub `FxConsole` module to assert idempotency.
name: [ui-01] FxConsole import wrapper
